ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iot_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IoT category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the IoT category */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth of the IoT category */,
  "ul_bitrate" TEXT /* Uplink bitrate of the IoT category */,
  "dl_bitrate" TEXT /* Downlink bitrate of the IoT category */,
  "duplex_mode" TEXT /* Duplex mode of the IoT category (e.g., full-duplex, half-duplex) */,
  "release" TEXT /* 3GPP release supported by the IoT category */,
  "max_connections" INTEGER /* Maximum number of simultaneous connections supported by the IoT category */,
  "security_features" TEXT /* Security features supported by the IoT category */,
  "latency" TEXT /* Typical latency for the IoT category */,
  "power_consumption" TEXT /* Estimated power consumption of devices in this category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the category information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IoT category the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the network resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of network resource (e.g., bandwidth, bitrate) */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Current status of the network resource (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "resource_capacity" TEXT /* Total capacity of the network resource */,
  "current_usage" TEXT /* Current usage of the network resource */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the resource status was checked */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the resource is deployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES iot_categories ("category_id")
)
